sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n32325" key="e)kleigmatw/dhs" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἐκ-λειγμᾰτώδης</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ες</itype>, <sense id="n32325.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">of the consistency required for a lozenge,</tr_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0718.tlg003:111" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Aët.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">3.111</biblScope></bibl>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0718.tlg012:67" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">12.67</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
